title: eragrostis monticola
intro: Eragrostis monticola, a species of grass native to Africa, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Eragrostis monticola include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis monticola include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
